title: Stunning White Ceramic Buddha Head Oil Burner - 13cm x 10.5cm (1 Pc.) - Unique Oil Diffuser Design & Ambiance Enhancer - Great for Home & Office Decor
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES: White Buddha Head Oil Burner, 1pc. 383g
MATTE DESIGN:This matte white Buddha head oil burner features a beautiful and durable design that would look great in any place of your home.
USE ANYWHERE: This beautifully made oil burner can be placed anywhere inside your room and would prove to be a charming addition to your home.
MATERIAL: This oil burner is made from ceramic which gives it durability and a very stylish design that is perfect when displayed in your home.

MULTIFUNCTIONAL: This item can also be used as a wax melt burner however it is advisable to consider the size and depth of the bowl when adding wax to ensure it will not overrun the edges when melted.
To be used with a tea light. Complete with lid
description: Product Description Our White Buddha Head Oil Burner will bring warmth and style to any room and is a perfect add to any home décor. Directions [PARTLY] The oil burner should be used with a tea light and includes a lid. Safety Warning Caution: May cause burns when touched. Avoid contact with undiluted essential oils. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Make sure there is sufficient air circulation during use. Box Contains 1 x White Buddha Head Oil Burner See more
